title: Either / Or
story: [Meridian-7 Log #014] rEx's communication protocol supports multiple transmission formats. You've discovered resource locators in the data that resemble human URLs — starting with http:// or https://. Does rEx also use hypertext? Or has it learned your protocols? Either way, extract all valid resource links.
promptChallenge: [Target] URLs that begin with http:// or https://.
hints: [Hint] URLs start with http:// or https://
[Hint] Anything after the protocol can be any non-whitespace characters
promptHints: Tell the AI that the URL protocol part has two variants
Hint the AI to use the ? quantifier to make 's' optional
Or use | to express an "or" relationship

feedback.onPass: [Pattern Accepted] Protocol identified. Multiple formats unified.
feedback.onFail: [Parse Failed] Protocol matching failed. You need to cover both variants.
feedback.onPerfect: [Decryption Success] Alternation applied perfectly. Flexible yet precise.
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Override] Manual multi-protocol handling. Alternation is no challenge for you.
